aiSummary: Customer is comparing premium vs. starter plans. Expressed strong interest in annual billing discount. Recommended sending comparison sheet and scheduling a 15-min call to close.

messages.text: Hi, I saw your premium plan. Can you tell me the difference between starter and premium?
Hello Sarah! Great question. The Premium plan includes priority support, advanced analytics, and custom integrations. I can send you a detailed comparison. Would that help?
Yes please! Also, do you have any annual billing discounts?
Absolutely! We offer 20% off on annual billing for both plans. I'll send the comparison sheet right away. Would you also like to schedule a quick call with our team?
That sounds great. Let's do Thursday afternoon.

aiSummary: Enterprise lead requesting integration demo. High-value prospect with a team of 200+. Needs API documentation and compliance certifications before proceeding.

messages.text: We're evaluating communication platforms for our 200+ person team. Can you share API docs and compliance certs?
Thank you for reaching out, James! I'd be happy to share our API documentation and SOC 2 compliance certifications. Can I also schedule a personalized demo for your team?
Yes, a demo would be great. We need to see the integration capabilities firsthand.

aiSummary: Customer is frustrated with delayed delivery and renewal pricing. Has threatened cancellation. Requires immediate manager callback and potential discount offer to retain.

messages.text: I've been waiting over a week for my order. This is completely unacceptable!
I sincerely apologize for the delay, Priya. Let me look into your order status immediately. Can you share your order number?
Order #4821. And your renewal price went up 30%! I want to talk to a manager right now.
I completely understand your frustration. I'm escalating this to our management team right away. A manager will call you back within the hour.
